Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Yuko was pissed, wasn't she? I've missed a lot of practice lately.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I should've told you last time, but um, my X-ray results...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}The muscles and tendons around my knee are inflamed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}The doctor said if I keep pushing it that I... won't be able to walk anymore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}He said I strained it too hard during practice. So freakin' stupid...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 2 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Every minute—every second counts! I can't waste any more time![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 2 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I promised I'd win at next year's meet and become the number one athlete in Japan.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}My nephew got into an accident, and his legs got messed up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}But if he goes through rehab, he might be able to recover![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}He says the rehab hurts too much, though, so he doesn't want to do it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}He's only five, y'know? There's still so much he hasn't done yet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}So I made a deal with my nephew. Just, uh... don't laugh, okay?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}If I become number one in Japan, he'll agree to go through rehab.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}That's why I have to win this meet—so I can make it to nationals![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}To tell you the truth... I don't think I can do it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 5 13 8 5 105}Thanks for caring, man... but I can't worry about that now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Sorry for all the trouble I've caused. And for all the depressing conversations.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}It's really tough keeping it all bottled up. You were the only one I could talk to.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Miyamoto opened up to[n]me about his troubles.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're becoming closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Yuko has good instincts when it comes to this stuff, so she might say something to you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Tell her to come talk to me if she does. I don't wanna drag you into this any deeper.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Miyamoto[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
